scripts.build:circuits: cd encrypted-ixs && arcium build && cp -r target/*.arcis ../build/
scripts.build: npm run build:circuits && npm run build:program
scripts.deploy:circuits: RPC_URL=https://api.devnet.solana.com node scripts/init-comp-defs.mjs && RPC_URL=https://api.devnet.solana.com node scripts/upload-circuits.mjs && node scripts/finalize-circuits.mjs
